description: CompositionBrown sneakers made of suede uppers and rubber outsole, with meshed collar and tongue Wash care1. Brush surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine wash This handsome pair of shoes from adidas mixes the rugged outdoorsy toughness of trekking shoes with the comfort of sneakers. The multi-layered suede uppers give long lasting comfort and durability while the cushioned tongue and collar give extra comfort. The protruding lugs and multi-directional lugs on the outsole give added grip and stability to the feet making this a perfect addition to your adventure wardrobe.
